p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: test_repo_build (runs node utils/build/build.js), test_repo_eslint_terminal (runs eslint on terminal/*.ts), test_repo_cli_help (runs cli.js --help). All 4 p2p tests pass (1 static + 3 repo_tests). Build and lint checks work in Docker container. CI commands tested: npm ci, node utils/build/build.js, eslint packages/playwright/src/mcp/terminal/*.ts, node packages/playwright/lib/mcp/terminal/cli.js --help.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: (1) Docker build successful, (2) NOP test reward=0 (fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base code), (3) Gold test reward=1 (all 11 tests pass after solve.sh applied), (4) Rubric judge returned 0.5 (expected - no API keys available for LLM evaluation). The gold solution correctly: renames kill-all to session-kill-all, adds install command with workspace init, changes config path to .playwright/cli.config.json, adds findWorkspaceDir function, replaces installationDirHash with workspaceDirHash, and updates SKILL.md and session-management.md documentation.
